description: Card title is literally 'Trunks'. Vision-pass identifies a young fighter with light-colored short hair swept to the side, blue jacket over dark inner layer, fists raised mid-power-up with golden ki bursting outward. The composition matches Kid Trunks (the present-timeline Buu-Saga child, canonical Junior Tournament cohort partner with Son Goten) per trunks.md's aliases: [...kid-trunks...] aspect coverage. suspected_ip already 'Trunks (Dragon Ball Z)' with ip_confidence: high at the per-card level; the character node already established with 10 corpus anchors. This is the missing 11th anchor — BT1 founding-set Trunks print that the wave 65 vision-pass surfaced. Clean N:1 collapse: card frontmatter gets characters: [trunks], node's appears_on gets the new entry. Edgelord notes this is the SECOND straight founding-set Trunks-character reference (TB2-007 'Tiny Rivals Trunks' from the World Martial Arts Tournament set is already wired) — BT1-039 + TB2-007 together anchor the Kid-Trunks Buu-Saga / Junior-Tournament cohort. Blueballs because it's not a 1:1 mirror, but the load-bearing graph improvement is real: a founding-set BT1 anchor for one of the franchise's primary characters should not be orphaned.
citations: [Dragon Ball Wiki: Trunks — canonical character page, Kid Trunks aspect; Buu-Saga Junior Tournament cohort partner with Son Goten]

other_candidates_considered: BT1-030 Son Goku // Super Saiyan Blue Son Goku → son-goku (parallel founding-set anchor; selected for E4)
BT1-036 God Charge Vegeta → vegeta (parallel founding-set anchor; would extend vegeta's appears_on from 3 to 4)
BT1-045 Boost Attack Piccolo → namekian (parallel founding-set anchor; would extend namekian's appears_on)

BT2-119 Cabira → REFUSED (canonical Frieza-Force-by-Chilled-genealogy soldier, but Frieza-Force node doesn't exist and no co-corpus partners; Toobi + Chilled + Bardock all not in inventory — solo card, no edge available)
Garruk's Uprising → REFUSED (Garruk character node doesn't exist; all related Garruk prints not in BBL corpus — solo card with no co-corpus partners; future-node candidate)

Vito Thorn of the Dusk Rose → REFUSED (Ixalan Legion of Dusk Church-of-Dusk vampire hierophant, NOT Ravnica Orzhov Syndicate; Elenda / Mavren Fein / Sanguine Bond all not in corpus; isolated character with no co-corpus partner; future-node candidate is church-of-dusk.md or legion-of-dusk.md when Elenda lands)
notes: Edgelord's professional sigh. Card-title-is-the-character match. Founding-set BT1 anchor for a character node with 10 prior entries should not be orphaned simply because no clean 1:1 mirror exists. The character-attach edge is load-bearing because future Discrete Lair work on the Buu-Saga / Junior-Tournament arc will index BT1-039 through trunks.md, not through the orphaned card-MD. The substrate counter does NOT change (E3 is an edge, not a node — substrate stays at 70 nodes post-E2).
